Meme GAME

BUY NUGX

NuggetRush is a free play to earn game on the Ethereum blockchain. Build your mining team and discover valuable minerals to earn and help real world artisanal miners in underdeveloped countries.

How to buy?

IN THE MEDIA

Accomplish challenges &

beat other miners to the loot!

A captivating play-to-earn game that immerses players in the world of gold and mineral mining. Nugget Rush provides a one-of-a-kind entertainment experience where players can create custom avatars and build their fortune by setting up mining facilities with the help of a team of mining experts or in partnership with other gamers. Players can sell or trade character NFTs on the marketplace along with other rare NFT items and mined materials representing real world assets.

AUDIT
JOIN THE RUSH

IN-GAME FEATURES: CHARACTERS

Create a custom avatar and become a master miner by assembling a team with distinctive skills and personalities to tackle the hurdles of constructing a profitable mining empire.

Collect character NFTs while searching for deposits and rare NFTs like RUSHGEMs that allow holders to swap for real-world GOLD.

#224105

Aisha Mbeki

Mbeki is a tech-savvy mining engineer hailing from Southern Africa. With her expertise in modern mining technologies and digital innovations, she brings cutting-edge equipment and digital solutions for maximizing efficiency and safety. Aisha's forward-thinking mindset and passion for technological advancements bring a fresh perspective to any team.

POWER

SKILL

LUCK

Aisha's forward-thinking mindset and passion for technological advancements bring a fresh perspective to any team.

#223307

Maxwell Stoneforge

Every team needs someone with natural leadership skills and experience not from a text book. Stoneforge has been mining since he could walk and that experience grants him legendary status as a master miner.

He has mined all over the world and encountered unique geological characteristics and unforeseen challenges.

POWER

SKILL

Maxwell Stoneforge

#223423

Olivia "Ollie" Wellspring

With her expertise in identifying geological formations and analyzing mineral compositions, she is a valuable asset to any team to locate the most promising mining sites. Ollie is resourceful, intelligent, and is Stoneforge's niece so mining is in her blood.

#223508

Liam "Spark" McLeod

Spark is a master mechanic and engineer. With his boundless energy and technical prowess, he keeps the mining equipment running smoothly and invents innovative tools to enhance productivity. Spark's quick thinking and problem-solving abilities are invaluable to a team's success.

#223648

Isabella "Bella" Rivera

Bella is a seasoned prospector with a keen eye for spotting mineral deposits. Her deep knowledge of mining history and folklore often uncovers hidden clues and legends, guiding her to untapped riches. Bella’s adventurous spirit and intuition make her a must have in any team.

#223648

Isabella "Bella" Rivera

#223723

Marcus "Mack" McAllister

Mack is a seasoned miner known for his strength, endurance, and resilience. After losing his hand on the job he has made it his mission to train new miners to always adhere to safety protocols as a safety officer. Mack's vast experience in tackling complex mining operations in challenging locations and his protective nature make him a trusted and valuable team member.

SKILL

#223723

Marcus "Mack" McAllister

Mack is a seasoned miner known for his strength, endurance, and resilience. Mack's vast experience in tackling complex mining operations in challenging locations and his protective nature make him a trusted and valuable team member.

#223814

Amelia "Mia" Gallagher

Mia is a skilled metallurgist who specializes in the refining and processing of extracted materials. She plays a crucial role in maximizing the value of mined materials by implementing advanced techniques and sustainable practices. Mia's knowledge of precious metals and her commitment to eco-friendly mining can help any team satisfy both regulatory requirements and increase revenue.

#223902

Xavier "X" Santiago

X is the South American procurement king with connections to a network of mining suppliers, vendors, and buyers. He can source and secure necessary equipment and negotiate favorable deals for his team. X's business acumen, extensive contacts, and persuasive skills adds value to a team in the competitive world of mining.

Xavier "X" Santiago

#224082

Kwame "rocksteady" Okoro

Hailing from the Gold Coast of Africa with its rich history of mining, RS brings experience and a deep knowledge of artisanal mining techniques. Guiding a team in its pursuit of sustainable and community-centric processes including social programs, education initiatives, and mining practices that uplift the lives of local communities. Kwame's rich cultural background, wisdom and experience empowering artisanal miners in underdeveloped countries can set a team apart.

POWER

SKILL

NUGGETRUSH: NUGX

Big features, no tax and zero fees

Support artisanal miners in underdeveloped countries.

Customise your own avatar NFTs & sell or trade them

Stake your NFT and earn high percentage APY

Join The Rush Guild & receive governance voting rights

Exchange or sell mined assets for real-world rewards

Player driven marketplace: Browse, buy, trade tools, machinery and special/rare items.

BUY NUGX

Support artisanal miners in underdeveloped countries.

Customise your own avatar NFTs & sell or trade them

Stake your NFT and earn high percentage APY

Exchange or sell mined assets for real-world rewards

Marketing & Partnerships

Competitions & Ecosystem Rewards

BENEFITS

EARN INCOME, REWARDS AND HELP MINERS

STAKE NFTs

NFT holders lock their assets in the system, similar to a classic staking mechanism, in order to receive rewards based on annual percentage yield (APY) and the quantity of NFTs staked. Owners cannot sell their NFTs during the staking period.

HELP ARTISANAL MINERS

A percentage of rewards and in game purchases go to artisanal miners in underdeveloped countries - It is estimated that more than 100 million people rely on informal mining activities carried out using low technology or with minimal machinery for income, mainly in developing nations.

EARN REWARDS

In game earnings can be traded or used to purchase machinery, customise characters, buy resource rich land and more. However, money earned in-game is not simply tied to the game for example if you find rare RUSHGEM NFTs, owners can exchange them for real world gold and have the assets delivered to their door.

BUY NOW
VERIFY SMART CONTRACT

ROADMAP

WELCOME TO IMPACT GAMING: BUILDING A COMMUNITY, CREATING AWARENESS AND INCOME

PROMO PERIOD

Time to spread the word and let everyone know about this amazing project and create awareness about the plight of artisanal miners worldwide with a major marketing drive with the aim of building a passionate and engaged community thats rewarded with consistent promotions and giveaways.

BUILD
PERIOD

Time to build and work, developing the game concept, design, marketplace, app and staking engine as well as collaborating with the community and influencers.

BUILD
PERIOD

LAUNCH
PERIOD

Time to launch on DEX with the team renouncing the smart contract and transferring ownership to community designated RUSH GUILD members. NFT staking and marketplace will be launched with characters, tools, equipment and machinery available to purchase including from third party marketplaces.

POWER

Project manager

Xavier

Marketing Manager

JOIN GIVEAWAYHOW TO BUYJOIN PRESALE

BIG Prize:

Holders of NUGX can win BIG with a $25,000 giveaway at the end of the presale to 3 lucky NUGX Hodlers. To qualify, connect and follow all our socials for entry rules and details.

Weekly Giveaways:

Throughout the presale, we're giving away $1000 in $100 and
$200 and $500 batches!
You can enter to win by holding a set number of NUGX tokens and/or engaging with us on any of our social channels. Winners will be chosen at random from the prize pool and announced continuously throughout our presale.
